channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Has Bitcoin Already Bottomed? Grayscale Says Macro Signals Matter More
item.description: Bitcoin may have already reached its low as analysts increasingly question whether the four-year cycle still applies today....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: Russian Hackers Exploit Zimbra Zero-Day Against US, Ukraine Targets
item.description: A state-sponsored threat group, dubbed "Laundry Bear," sends "half-click" phishing emails that require a victim only to open or preview the message....

item.title: New Dolphin X malware uses AI to rank high-value targets
item.description: A new Dolphin X remote access trojan claims to use an AI-powered profiling feature to score and rank infected users, helping cybercriminals identify which victims should be targeted first. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

A Russian state-supported espionage group spent months reading Western mailboxes through a then-unknown flaw in Zimbra's webmail client.
The payload goes after the last 90 days of email, the organiza...

item.title: Why Modern SOCs Need Multi-Layered Detections
item.description: The cycle is over. For years, cybersecurity followed a familiar pattern: defenses improved, attackers adapted, and the back-and-forth continued. Today, AI-equipped attackers are simply outpacing defen...
